The following events took place in '''128 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Births==
*[[Eppie Belden|Eppie Antruse]], future wife of [[Orn Belden]], on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' states that Eppie Belden is 132 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old at the time of the [[Bakura Incident]], which takes place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Although this year is not stated outright in the source material, simple mathematics arrives at a birth date of 128 BBY.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' {{Imo}}
